snippet.title: Singapore CNY tragedy: Five die after car slams into shophouse, fire breaks out
snippet.description:
Five people died and one was injured after a BMW slammed into the front of a shophouse before bursting into flames at Tanjong Pagar Road in Singapore Saturday (Feb 13) morning.
 
Preliminary investigations revealed the car was driven by a 29-year-old man with four male passengers, in their 20s.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMedia’s direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMedia’s rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks！明日除夕，挂灯笼、贴对联、备好年货过大年啦！丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New Year’s Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who can’t get together with their families back in the hometown.
I’m convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!
一年又到头啦！
年俗、年货小零食做起来准备过大年喽～
瓜子 花生 糖葫芦、馓子 虾片走起来！
给所有没回家就地过年的小伙伴们大大的拥抱
我相信，生生不息的希望和好运
一定会和2021一起到来

#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New Year’s Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who can’t get together with their families back in the hometown.
I’m convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!

年俗、年货小零食做起来准备过大年喽～
瓜子 花生 糖葫芦、馓子 虾片走起来！

snippet.title: Eric周興哲《如果能幸福 Fortunate》Official MV - HBO Asia 原創影集《戒指流浪記》片尾曲
snippet.description:
🎧 Stream/Download here : https://eric.lnk.to/Fortunate
🔔 Subscribe To My YouTube Channel : https://sonymusic.pse.is/ericyoutube

人生是由無數的選擇堆砌而成，
所有選擇之後都有個 ”如果”
如果…我能更勇敢一點？
如果…我能說出口？
如果…我能不放棄？
所有的抉擇伴隨著遺憾刻成未來的地圖，
而目的地，是不是幸福？

HBO Asia 原創影集《戒指流浪記》片尾曲
周興哲《如果能幸福》


・Song Lyrics・

詞：Eric周興哲／吳易緯
曲：Eric周興哲

有時候  想往前走
卻又  忍耐不住  頻頻回頭
奔跑在風和日麗  突然間  有狂風暴雨
等待下個雨過天晴

有時候  我會經過
以前  似曾相識  相遇街口
捧在  手心裡的夢  再努力握不住以後
我們才會害怕給承諾

如果  幸福  能像  戒指  能戴在手上
至少下一次  逞強  受傷  能夠  少點迷惘
如果  幸福  需要  走過  必經的掙扎
我一個人  必然堅強  不怕流浪

如果  眼淚  能像  戒指  能反射微光
閃耀每一刻  過去  現在  未來  不再躲藏
如果  幸福  真的  為我  等待在前方
就不害怕  問你  這句話

「你愛我嗎」

有時候  想往回走
回去  回不去的  回憶盡頭
當時  曾對自己說  「如果能幸福就好了」
為什麼現在不敢擁有

有時候  你會笑我
討厭寂寞  卻不敢  先愛再說
如果  能幸福  誰會放棄  寧願擦身而過
不要我們是這種結果

如果  幸福  能像  戒指  能戴在手上
至少下一次  逞強  受傷  能夠  少點迷惘
如果  幸福  需要  走過  必經的掙扎
我一個人  必然堅強  不怕流浪

如果  眼淚  能像  戒指  能反射微光
閃耀每一刻  過去  現在  未來  不再躲藏
如果  幸福  真的  為我  等待在前方
就不害怕  親口  回答  這句話

「我愛你啊」


・Song Credit・

詞 Lyricist：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou／吳易緯 I-Wei Wu
曲 Composer：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou

製作人 Producer：馬敬恆 T-Ma／Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
編曲 Music Arranger：馬敬恆 T-Ma

和聲編寫 Backing Vocals Arrangement：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
和聲 Backing Vocals：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou

配唱錄音工程師 Vocal Recording Engineer：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
配唱錄音室 Vocal Recording Studio：Echou Productions

弦樂編寫 String Arrangement：馬敬恆 T-Ma
弦樂 Strings：靳海音弦樂團 Jin Hai Yin String Orchestra
弦樂錄音室：Tweak Tone Labs

混音工程師 Mixing Engineer：Brian Paturalski
混音錄音室 Mixing Studio：Dance Party Studio
母帶後期處理工程師 Mastering Engineer：Randy Merrill
母帶後期處理錄音室 Mastering Studio：Sterling Sound

OP：星空飛騰國際娛樂股份有限公司／植光土壤音創 Light 2 Run Music Creation
SP：Universal Ms Publ Ltd Taiwan

zh-Hant.title: Eric周興哲《如果能幸福 Fortunate》Official MV - HBO Asia 原創影集《戒指流浪記》片尾曲
zh-Hant.description:
🎧 Stream/Download here : https://eric.lnk.to/Fortunate
🔔 Subscribe To My YouTube Channel : https://sonymusic.pse.is/ericyoutube

人生是由無數的選擇堆砌而成，
所有選擇之後都有個 ”如果”
如果…我能更勇敢一點？
如果…我能說出口？
如果…我能不放棄？
所有的抉擇伴隨著遺憾刻成未來的地圖，
而目的地，是不是幸福？

HBO Asia 原創影集《戒指流浪記》片尾曲
周興哲《如果能幸福》


・Song Lyrics・

詞：Eric周興哲／吳易緯
曲：Eric周興哲

有時候  想往前走
卻又  忍耐不住  頻頻回頭
奔跑在風和日麗  突然間  有狂風暴雨
等待下個雨過天晴

有時候  我會經過
以前  似曾相識  相遇街口
捧在  手心裡的夢  再努力握不住以後
我們才會害怕給承諾

如果  幸福  能像  戒指  能戴在手上
至少下一次  逞強  受傷  能夠  少點迷惘
如果  幸福  需要  走過  必經的掙扎
我一個人  必然堅強  不怕流浪

如果  眼淚  能像  戒指  能反射微光
閃耀每一刻  過去  現在  未來  不再躲藏
如果  幸福  真的  為我  等待在前方
就不害怕  問你  這句話

「你愛我嗎」

有時候  想往回走
回去  回不去的  回憶盡頭
當時  曾對自己說  「如果能幸福就好了」
為什麼現在不敢擁有

有時候  你會笑我
討厭寂寞  卻不敢  先愛再說
如果  能幸福  誰會放棄  寧願擦身而過
不要我們是這種結果

如果  幸福  能像  戒指  能戴在手上
至少下一次  逞強  受傷  能夠  少點迷惘
如果  幸福  需要  走過  必經的掙扎
我一個人  必然堅強  不怕流浪

如果  眼淚  能像  戒指  能反射微光
閃耀每一刻  過去  現在  未來  不再躲藏
如果  幸福  真的  為我  等待在前方
就不害怕  親口  回答  這句話

「我愛你啊」


・Song Credit・

詞 Lyricist：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou／吳易緯 I-Wei Wu
曲 Composer：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou

製作人 Producer：馬敬恆 T-Ma／Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
編曲 Music Arranger：馬敬恆 T-Ma

和聲編寫 Backing Vocals Arrangement：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
和聲 Backing Vocals：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou

snippet.title: 2021 Spring Festival Gala: Wushu – A revered part of Chinese culture
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://www.cgtn.com/video

Led by renowned wushu artists Donnie Yen and Wu Jing, "Wushu Performance: Heroes of Heaven And Earth" wowed this year's gala audience by placing a natural landscape as the background of the performance through augmented reality (AR) technology.

Wushu is a revered part of Chinese culture with many styles of wushu listed as national intangible cultural heritage. Last year, Taijiquan, a form of wushu, was listed as a UNESCO intangible cultural heritage.
#SpringFestival2021 #SpringFestivalGala

snippet.title: 《中央广播电视总台2021年春节联欢晚会》 1/4 | CCTV春晚
snippet.description:
本期节目主要内容：
01:00 开场歌舞《万事如意》 演唱：佟丽娅 陈伟霆（中国香港） 江疏影 杜江 欧阳娜娜（中国台湾） 龙紫岚（中国澳门）；
08:03 歌舞《节日》
08:43（1）《非洲歌舞》 领唱：朱明瑛；演唱：谢一梅 牛妞 李丁 王呈章；领舞：刘洋 王晶
09:35（2）《埃及藤杖舞与东方舞》 领唱：沈娅丽 霍思羽 西尔艾力；领舞：刘婕
10:49（3）《西班牙响板舞与阿根廷探戈》 领唱：洪之光 葛晓璐；领舞：王梓丁
12:21（4）《俄罗斯民俗舞》领舞：张翰
13:09（5）《中国红绸舞》领舞：殷硕 曾明；表演：中国东方演艺集团
14:46 相声《年三十的歌》 表演：岳云鹏 孙越；
29:37 创意表演《牛起来》 演唱：刘德华（中国香港） 关晓彤 王一博；
35:14 武术《天地英雄》 主演：甄子丹（中国香港） 吴京；
42:00 小品《一波三折》 演员：贾玲 张小斐 许君聪 ト钰 泰维 刘宏禄 孙集斌；
59:27 歌曲《奔跑的青春》 演唱：迪丽热巴 李现 刘浩存 陈立农（中国台湾） 无限少女 时代少年团；
01:03:38 特别节目《向祖国报告》 讲述人：任鲁豫 嘉宾：杨孟飞 张柏楠 谢军 孙泽洲 “2020全国脱贫攻坚奖”获奖个人及组织代表；
01:10:26 歌曲《追梦之路》 演唱：韩红；
01:14:22 舞蹈《茉莉》 领舞：孟庆旸。

snippet.title: Can You Be Single And Happy? | Real Talk Season 2 Episode 16
snippet.description:
For most people, finding their life-long partner is the ultimate goal but does that mean that we can't be happy if haven't found ours?

Valentine's Day is coming but instead of talking about love, love, love, the cast discusses about their single lives and their thoughts about being ready for a relationship.

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

Checkout The Trailer in Other Languages👇

snippet.title: CHUNG HA 청하 'Bicycle' MV
snippet.description:
CHUNG HA 청하 'Bicycle' MV

Stream/ Download 'Bicycle' : https://ffm.to/chungha_bicycle
Subscribe CHUNG HA : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Gxb0gMCh3EPIDLQXeQUog

CHUNG HA The 1st Studio Album [ Querencia ] 'Bicycle'

With the strong fuzz guitar intro this song expresses the excitement and overwhelming energy of going forward by stepping on the pedal with R&B pop-trap sounds.
The straightforward lyrics in the chorus that lead to “Get out of my way-ah! / I’ll show you how I like it” and the unhindered attitude stamps a seal on her irreplaceable presence as an independent and energetic solo artist. 

강렬한 퍼즈 기타의 도입부와 함께 전개되는 R&B 팝-트랩 사운드와 함께 페달을 밟아 앞으로 나아가는 순간의 설렘과 벅찬 에너지를 표현해낸 곡. “Get out of my way-ah! / 보여줄게 how I like it”로 이어지는 코러스 파트의 직선적인 가사와 거침없는 애티튜드는 독립적이고도 에너지 넘치는 솔로 아티스트로서의 자신감과 그 누구도 대체할 수 없는 존재감을 각인시킨다.


[ CHUNG HA 'Bicycle' Credits ]

Subscribe CHUNG HA : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Gxb0gMCh3EPIDLQXeQUog

CHUNG HA The 1st Studio Album [ Querencia ] 'Bicycle'

With the strong fuzz guitar intro this song expresses the excitement and overwhelming energy of going forward by stepping on the pedal with R&B pop-trap sounds.
The straightforward lyrics in the chorus that lead to “Get out of my way-ah! / I’ll show you how I like it” and the unhindered attitude stamps a seal on her irreplaceable presence as an independent and energetic solo artist. 

강렬한 퍼즈 기타의 도입부와 함께 전개되는 R&B 팝-트랩 사운드와 함께 페달을 밟아 앞으로 나아가는 순간의 설렘과 벅찬 에너지를 표현해낸 곡. “Get out of my way-ah! / 보여줄게 how I like it”로 이어지는 코러스 파트의 직선적인 가사와 거침없는 애티튜드는 독립적이고도 에너지 넘치는 솔로 아티스트로서의 자신감과 그 누구도 대체할 수 없는 존재감을 각인시킨다.

snippet.title: Alex Pandian | New Releases Tamil Movie | Eng Subtitle | Karthi, Anushka Shetty, Santhanam | Full HD
snippet.description:
Subscribe Channel  :-  https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1iUOD94krWyibcvoxDnqFA?sub_confirmation=1

The film's hare-brained plot involves a petty criminal Alex Pandian who abducts the Chief Minister's daughter for a coterie of bad men consisting of an NRI businessman who wants to import some banned antibiotics from US, a rich doctor (Suman), a Godman, the Chief Secretary and City Police Commissioner! How our hero as a one-man-army thwarts the operation is the story.

Alex, a small-time thief, gets a contract to kidnap the chief minister's daughter, Divya, for three days. But when Divya reveals to him the real reason for her kidnap, he decides to help her.

Cast
Karthi as Alex Pandian
Anushka Shetty as Divya
Santhanam as Kaalayan
Milind Soman as Alvin Martin
Suman as Dr. GKM
Visu as Chief Minister
Prathap Pothen as Radhakrishnan (C.M Secretary)
Mahadevan as Swamiji
Nikita Thukral as Gayathri as Kaalyan's Elder Sister
Sanusha as Sneha Kaalyan's last Sister's
Akanksha Puri as Kaalyan's Sister
Manobala as Captain Divakaran
Saravanan as Parthiban
Renuka as Rani
Vaiyapuri as Nandu
Lollu Sabha Manohar as Saani Urundai
Nedumudi Venu as Anuya 's Father
Reenu Mathews as Anuya
Santhana Bharathi
Rajkapoor
Aryan
Vichu Vishwanath

snippet.title: 'I’m not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

关注【微信公众号】最新独家内容抢先看！
江苏卫视官方微信“JSBC-JSTV”
非诚勿扰官方微信“jstv-fcwr”
     
        《新相亲大会》第五季回来了！节目定档1月24日，于每周日晚间21:10与广大电视观众见面。作为一档生活服务类节目，《新相亲大会》能够在综艺舞台上连续播出五季，并且热度持续高涨。这一方面，仰仗于其最为核心的服务属性，为单身男女提供了一个婚恋交友的平台；另一方面，也得益于婚恋话题独有的社会粘性，往期节目每期都有婚恋热议话题便是绝佳证明。除此之外，更应归功于节目组不断地推陈出新，在维护节目内核不变的情况下，不断推出最适合当下年轻人的相亲模式。新一季《新相亲大会》，将继续在创新升级上下功夫：邀请明星助力官开启星素对话，合理化舞台功能分区强化代际沟通。既好看又极具现实意义，最美好的姻缘就要来临，欢迎大家订阅和关注！

snippet.title: Bhoy | New Natok 2021 | Mosharraf Karim, Nadia, Shamim Zaman | Bangla New Natok | Bangladeshi Drama
snippet.description:
Bhoy Natok starring Mosharraf Karim & Sallha Khanam Nadia in lead roles, directed by Shamim Zaman.

New Natok 2021 - Bhoy (ভয়) - Natok New 2021
[A Eagle Music Original Drama]

Story, Screenplay & Direction by Shamim Zaman
Chief Assistant Director: Osman Auvi
Cinematographer: Sumon Hossain

Cast: Mosharraf Karim, Sallha Khanam Nadia, Shamim Zaman, Masum Basher, Mili Basher, Sabrina Tonni, and Monisha Sikder

Voy Natok/ Voy Bangla Natok Co-Cast: Forgan Milton, Ratul, Shokhorio Mondal, Asraful Islam Raju, Rabbi Hossain Ujjal, J.K Shapon, Heramony, Khaleda Akter Anny & Liza Akter

Edit & Color: Bappi
Background Score: Ankur Mahmud

Assistant Director: Nabiullah Mirza, Ahsan Habib, Khalid Hossain Khalid
Dop Assistant: Mustakin Al Hasan
Camera Assistant: Chandan Roy, Tanvir Rio, Bonny Mahmud

Song: Konna Tomar Hridoy Parate
Singer: AH Turjo
Lyrics & Tune: Salman Ahmed Suhag
Music: AH Turjo

লাইটঃ ইউনুছ সানাই, তোসিকুল ইসলাম, তারেক, লিমন
ট্রলিঃ হাতেম
মেকাপ শিল্পীঃ মো. রিমান
মেকাপ সহকারীঃ মো. সুজন
ব্যবস্থাপনাঃ শাহীন সিনান, রুবেল, তরিকুল, মন্ডল
হাউজঃ জে.কে শ্যুটিং হাউজ
খাবার সরবরাহঃ আবুল খায়ের
গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ আলতাফ, কামরুল
জেনারেটরঃ সজল
লোকেশনঃ মানিকগঞ্জ

Label: Eagle Music™
Produced By: Kachi Ahmed

Bangladeshi Drama: Bhoy Bangla Natok (ভয় বাংলা নাটক) © 2020 Eagle Music
#Bhoy #MosharrafKarim #SallhaKhanamNadia #ShamimZaman #BangladeshiNatok

snippet.title: Everton 0-2 Fulham | Premier League Highlights | Josh Maja at the double on Merseyside
snippet.description:
Watch the key moments from Goodison Park as Fulham faced Everton on Valentine's Day in the Premier League looking to secure their first league win at the ground.

Enjoy match highlights, player reactions, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Aleksandar Mitrović, Alphonse Areola, Ruben Loftus-Cheek, Kenny Tete, Antonee Robinson, Frank Anguissa and many more.

snippet.title: Trump attorney rips off mic after questioning from CBSN anchor
snippet.description:
The Senate voted Saturday to acquit former President Donald Trump on a charge of inciting the January 6th insurrection at the Capitol. Following the vote, defense attorney Michael van der Veen joined CBSN's Lana Zak to discuss the trial in a sometimes contentious interview.

CBSN is CBS News’ 24/7 digital streaming news service featuring live, anchored coverage available for free across all platforms. Launched in November 2014, the service is a premier destination for breaking news and original storytelling from the deep bench of CBS News correspondents and reporters. CBSN features the top stories of the day as well as deep dives into key issues facing the nation and the world. CBSN has also expanded to launch local news streaming services in major markets across the country. CBSN is currently available on CBSNews.com and the CBS News app across more than 20 platforms, as well as the CBS All Access subscription service.

snippet.description:

📷  CALVIN’S INSTAGRAM »  @fkndeliciousness 

Like our music? Enjoy a free 30-day of Epidemic Sound for the best royalty free music: http://share.epidemicsound.com/BEFRS 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
BONES

1. VY GARDEN
ADDRESS: 87H Lê Văn Duyệt, Binh Thanh District, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/VY-garden-122587309134787

🐖SPICY PORK NECK BONE: Slow cook the bones for 2 hours or more. Use the stock to make the broth that includes green chillies, scallion and lime juice. Finally pour the broth all over the bones and serve. 

💸 PRICE: 150.000 / $6.50 USD per ½ kg 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
2. LẨU RẮN BONA
ADDRESS: 909 Trần Xuân Soạn Street, District 7, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/Bona797979
 
🐍SNAKE SALAD: Clean the snake and remove intestines. Place the snake in a pressure cooker for 15 minutes. Separate the bones. Add julienned onion, julienned snake meat, condensed soy sauce, sugar, salt, MSG, pork bone powder, fish sauce, fresh chillies and lime juice in a bowl. Plate and top with peanuts. 

🐍SNAKE HOTPOT: After cooking the snake in the pressure cooker, de-bone and chop into small pieces then place it in a pot with the hotpot broth. Serve with vermicelli noodles and herbs.

🐍DEEP-FRIED SNAKE BONES: Season the snake bones with condensed soy sauce, MSG, fish sauce, soy sauce, chilly sauce and deep fry on low fire for 15 mins.

💸 PRICE: 950.000 / $41.2 USD per snake  
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
3. HỦ TÍU XÍ QUÁCH CHỊ PHỤNG
ADDRESS: 71Đ Bửu Đình Street, Ward 5, District 6, HCMC 
 
🐖PORK BONE MARROW: Assemble Hu tieu noodles, scallion, fried garlic, fried onion, minced pork and pork bone broth in a bowl and serve it with a separate bowl full of pork marrow.
 
💸 PRICE: 60.000 VND / $2.60 USD
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
4. BENARAS GARDENIA 
ADDRESS: 28 Trần Ngọc Diện Street, Thảo Điền Ward, District 2, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/BenarasIndianRestaurantLounge 

🐑 LAAL MAAS (MUTTON MARROW CURRY): Marinate the mutton marrow with ginger, garlic paste, salt, paprika powder and turmeric powder then leave it for 1 hour. | Curry: Add vegetable oil, bay leaf, star anise, cinamon, garlic cloves, minced garlic, chopped onions, turmeric powder, fresh tomato puree, salt, paprika coriander powder, cumin powder and inhouse mixed powder in a pot for five minutes. Add the marinated mutton bones in the curry base and cook for 30 minutes. Put the combination in the pressure cooker and cook for 20 minutes to soften the mutton meat. Plate & serve with garlic naan. 
 
💸 PRICE: 249.000 VND / 10.79 USD 
 
#BestEverBoneTour #BestEverFoodReviewShow #BEFRS

Hey, I’m Sonny! I’m from the US but currently call Vietnam home. I’ve been living in Asia for 10 years and started making food and travel videos to document my experiences. I travel to different parts of the world, hunting down and documenting the most unique food each country has to offer. 

If you see any factual food errors in my videos, please feel free to politely let me know in the comments. I'm a huge fan of trying different, interesting foods in each country. My show is from a Western point of view, but more importantly, MY point of view. It is not meant to offend any person or culture.

id.title: Tahun Baru Imlek akan tiba lagi, aku membuat “Hidangan Sapi” menyambut Tahun Baru Imlek!
id.description:
※Tekan tombol pada menu di kanan bawah, maka akan muncul subtitle dengan bahasa yang sesuai!

Selamat Tahun Baru kepada semuanya. Lagi-lagi setahun dilewati. Setelah makan kenyang hidangan di malam Tahun Baru Imlek, maka sudah terhitung memasuki tahun yang baru! Terima kasih kalian dalam setahun ini selalu menemani dan mendukungku. Di tahun yang baru ini, semoga yang beruntung adalah kamu, yang berbahagia adalah kamu, yang sehat adalah kamu, yang menjadi kaya adalah kamu, semoga yang selalu menamaniku di kemudian hari juga kamu.

Halo semuanya. Aku adalah Dianxi Xiaoge, seorang gadis khas Yunnan. Jika kalian menyukai videoku, silakan terus ikuti saluranku ini. Aku akan berbagi kehidupanku dan makanan lezat khas Yunnan di platform yang berbeda. Semoga kalian setiap hari berbahagia, dan setiap hari selalu ditemani makanan lezat~

ko.title: 연야반(年夜饭)을 한 상 차리고, “소 한상”을 차려서 설을 맞이합시다！
ko.description:
※우측 상단 메뉴의 cc버튼을 클릭하시면 원하시는 언어의 자막이 나옵니다!

여러분 새해 복 많이 받으세요~ 또다시 한 해를 떠나보냈네요. 이번 연야반(年夜饭: 섣달 그믐날에 온 가족이 모여 먹는 식사)을 다 먹고 나면, 이제 새로운 한 해가 시작됩니다! 지난 한 해 여러분이 함께해주시고 많은 응원을 해주셔서 감사합니다. 새로운 한 해에는 행운, 행복, 건강, 재복 모두 함께하시길 바라고, 앞으로도 저와 함께해주시길 바라겠습니다~ 

여러분 안녕하세요! 저는 전서소가(뎬시샤오꺼) 운남 본토 아가씨 입니다. 제 영상이 마음에 드신다면 계속해서 제 채널을 구독해주세요.
저는 몇가지 플랫폼에서 제 일상과 운남 특색 미식들을 공유하고있습니다. 여러분 좋은하루되시고 매일 맛있는 음식과 함께하시길 바라겠습니다~

hi.title: नए साल की शाम डिनर की एक तालिका तैयार की गई, नए साल का स्वागत करने के लिए "बैल
hi.description:
※नीचे दाऐ कोना मेनू बार में सीसी बटन पर क्लिक करें, तो संबंधित भाषा में उपशीर्षक दिखाई होगी। 

सभी को नया साल मुबारक हो ~ पुराने को विदाई देने और नए का स्वागत करने के लिए एक और वर्ष आया है, इस नए साल की शाम डिनर के खाने के बाद तो आधिकारिक रूप से नया साल का प्रवेश किया गया है! पिछले साल के दौरान आपकी कंपनी और समर्थन के लिए आप सभी का धन्यवाद देती हूं। नए साल में, शुभकामनाएं आप हैं, खुशी आप हैं, स्वास्थ्य आप हैं, धन आप हैं, और आशा है कि भविष्य में मेरे साथ भी आप रहेंगे ~

सभी को नमस्कार, मैं दिअन षि षीओग, युन्नान की एक असली छोटी बहन। अगर आपको मेरा वीडियो पसंद है तो मेरे चैनल को देखना जारी रखें। मैं विभिन्न प्लेटफार्मों पर अपने जीवन और युन्नान विशिष्टताओं को साझा करूं, मुझे ख्वाइश है कि आप हर दिन खुश रहें स्वादिष्ट भोजन के साथ ~

zh.description:
大家新年快乐呀~又是一年辞旧岁，吃完这顿年夜饭，就算正式进入新的一年了！感谢大家这一年的陪伴和支持，新的一年，好运是你，幸福是你，健康是你，发财是你，希望未来陪着我的也是你~

bn.title: নববর্ষের রাতের খাবার প্রস্তুত হয়ে গেছে，নতুন বছরকে স্বাগত জানাতে এক টেবিল "গরুর মাংসের" খাবার
bn.description:
※মেনু বারের নীচের ডানদিকে কোণার সিসি বোতামটি ক্লিক করুন এবং সংশ্লিষ্ট ভাষায় সাবটাইটেল উপস্থিত হবে!

সবাইকে নববর্ষের শুভেচ্ছা! আবারো পুরানো বছরকে বিদায় জানাতে হলো, এই নববর্ষের আগের রাতের খাবার খাওয়ার পরে, আমরা আনুষ্ঠানিকভাবে নতুন বছরে প্রবেশ করলাম, গত বছরে সঙ্গ এবং সমর্থন দেওয়ার জন্য আপনাদের ধন্যবাদ! নতুন এই বছর, আপনাদের জন্য বয়ে আনুক সুখ, সু-স্বাস্থ্য, সম্পদ এই শুভ কামনাই রইল এবং আমি আশা করি ভবিষ্যতেও আপনারা আমার সাথে থাকবেন ~

সবাইকে অভিবাদন! আমি ডায়ানজি জিয়াওজে, ইউনান প্রদেশের স্থানীয় এক মেয়ে, আপনি যদি আমার ভিডিও পছন্দ করেন তবে দয়া করে আমার চ্যানেলটি অনুসরণ করুন, আমি ইউনান্নে আমার জীবন এবং বিশেষ খাবারগুলি বিভিন্ন প্ল্যাটফর্মে শেয়ার করব, আমি আপনাকে প্রতিদিন সুখী করতে চাই এবং প্রতিদিন সুস্বাদু খাবার খাওয়া~

th.title: อาหารค่ำในวันรวมญาติ - ฉลองเทศกาลตรุษจีนด้วยอาหารแนว "วัว" - ต้อนรับ "ปีฉลู"!
th.description:
※คลิกปุ่ม "คำบรรยาย" ที่แถบเมนูด้านล่างขวาเพื่อเลือกแสดงซับไตเติ้ลภาษาไทย

สุขสันต์วันตรุษจีนค่ะ, เพื่อน ๆ ทุกคน ! 
ปีเก่ากำลังผ่านไป, ปีใหม่กำลังจะมาถึง
หลังจากอาหารในวันรวมญาติของค่ำคืนนี้
เราก็จะเข้าสู่ปีใหม่อย่างเป็นทางการ
ขอขอบคุณ,
สำหรับความรักและการสนับสนุนในปีที่ผ่านมาค่ะ
เนื่องในโอกาสปีใหม่ของจีนปีนี้
ขอให้ทุกท่านประสบโชคดี, มีความสุข, มีสุขภาพดี
และความมั่งคั่ง ด้วยค่ะ
 ~ หวังว่าเราจะอยู่ด้วยกันตลอดไปค่ะ ! ~

สวัสดีค่ะ เพื่อน ๆ ทุกคน !
ฉันคือเตียนซี เสี่ยวเกอ (Dianxi Xiaoge-滇西小哥)
เป็นสาวชาวพื้นเมืองจากมณฑลยูนนาน ประเทศจีน
หากคุณชื่นชอบวิดีโอนี้กรุณากด "ติดตาม" ช่องของฉันด้วยค่ะ
ฉันจะได้นำเสนอเรื่องราวของฉันและอาหารตามแบบฉบับของยูนนาน มาแบ่งปันต่อไป
ขอให้คุณมีความสุขและเพลิดเพลินกับอาหารอร่อยทุก ๆ วันด้วยค่ะ

vi.title: Chuẩn bị sẵn một mâm cơm tất niên, làm một bàn “ thịt bò” đón năm mới!
vi.description:
※click chuột nhấn vào cc ở góc dưới bên phải màn hình, thì sẽ có bản sub tương ứng với ngôn ngữ của bạn xuất hiện rồi !

chúc cả nhà năm mới vui vẻ ~ lại là một năm tạm biệt tuổi cũ, ăn xong bữa cơm tất niên này, thì  được tính là chính thức bước sang một năm mới rồi! Cảm ơn xác bạn trong một năm qua đã đồng hành và ủng hộ, một năm mới, may mắn là bạn, hạnh phúc là bạn, mạnh khoẻ là bạn, phát tài là bạn, hi vọng đồng hành với tôi trong tương lai cũng là bạn ~

Chào các bạn! Tôi là Điền Tây tiểu ca, một cô gái  chính hiệu của tỉnh Vân Nam, nếu như các bạn thích video của tôi, có thể tiếp tục theo dõi trang của tôi, tôi sẽ chia sẻ cuộc sống của tôi ở các  trang,  và các món ăn đặc sắc của Vân Nam, chúc các bạn luôn luôn vui vẻ, ngày nào cũng có ẩm thực bầu bạn~

snippet.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye Doucouré and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

snippet.title: Bayern Munich v Tigres UANL | FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 Final | Match Highlights
snippet.description:
Benjamin Pavard’s second-half goal proved the difference as UEFA Champions League winners Bayern Munich won the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 after a victory against Mexico’s Tigres UANL. FC Bayern’s world title triumph makes it a clean sweep of six trophies for the German giants, emulating the achievement of Barcelona in 2009/10.

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜競馬Fact Check Live直播11場HKJC香港賽馬會沙田草地日馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬|蘋果日報 Apple Daily | 20210214
snippet.description:
今日（14日）大年初三，祝各位馬運亨通！沙田馬場上演11場賽事，頭場定於下午12時30分開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

《競馬Fact Check》今季新增AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，仲會新增出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》新增參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，以及運用數據以圖表拆解賽事模式等，多角度資訊讓讀者參考發個新年財。

《競馬Fact Check》將於上午11時50分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》會全程直播。

蘋果日報 ： http://hk.apple.nextmedia.com
即 like 蘋果 fb  ： http://www.facebook.com/hk.nextmedia
iPhone App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-iPhone
Android App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-Android
=======

snippet.title: G.E.M.鄧紫棋【平行世界 Parallel】MV （電影《刺殺小說家》主題曲)
snippet.description:
其實當初收到刺殺小說家的主題曲邀約時，因為時間非常少，少到不知道夠不夠時間創作及製作好歌曲、即使能寫完歌也不可能來得及報批進電影使用的那種程度，所以我本來以為得婉拒了。但是沒想到短短一個預告卻很打動我：這世上是否真的有平行世界？在這個時空錯過的東西，是否真的能在平行世界裡珍惜？

接下來在我看完電影預告後的五分鐘裡，平行世界的旋律就寫好了。緊接著我約了看片，看完片第二天歌詞也寫好了。

一切來的如此自然，是因為這個故事真的深深在觸動我。誰沒失去過？誰沒無奈過？誰沒怨恨過？但只要有一絲希望，你就會無論如何都仍然堅信著⋯有時候愛就是旁人看來很荒謬，你卻堅定不移；每個人都讓你放棄，你卻還在守侯。他們說愛讓人變得卑微嗎？你說愛讓人變得無比堅強；他們說是愛使人變得愚蠢嗎？你說是愛使人能面對一切的不可能。

因爲 ”我最後的信念，是若與你，再遇見⋯”

《平行世界》
作曲：G.E.M.鄧紫棋
作詞：G.E.M.鄧紫棋

失去你  我忘了天空曾經是  藍色
找不到你  我眼睛才在帽子下  躲著
不是愛上沉默  只是若你聽不見  何必呢
誰願到處漂泊  但你若不在  終點為何 

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你  再重寫

若與你  再遇見
能否與你  再重寫

從天而降的你  像一場流星雨  美麗
讓我措手不及  來不及許願就  失去你
玫瑰為什麼鮮紅  因為愛過的都痛
留守漆黑的夜空  我期盼著你的影蹤

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你  再重寫

localized.title: G.E.M.鄧紫棋【平行世界 Parallel】MV （電影《刺殺小說家》主題曲)
localized.description:
其實當初收到刺殺小說家的主題曲邀約時，因為時間非常少，少到不知道夠不夠時間創作及製作好歌曲、即使能寫完歌也不可能來得及報批進電影使用的那種程度，所以我本來以為得婉拒了。但是沒想到短短一個預告卻很打動我：這世上是否真的有平行世界？在這個時空錯過的東西，是否真的能在平行世界裡珍惜？

接下來在我看完電影預告後的五分鐘裡，平行世界的旋律就寫好了。緊接著我約了看片，看完片第二天歌詞也寫好了。

一切來的如此自然，是因為這個故事真的深深在觸動我。誰沒失去過？誰沒無奈過？誰沒怨恨過？但只要有一絲希望，你就會無論如何都仍然堅信著⋯有時候愛就是旁人看來很荒謬，你卻堅定不移；每個人都讓你放棄，你卻還在守侯。他們說愛讓人變得卑微嗎？你說愛讓人變得無比堅強；他們說是愛使人變得愚蠢嗎？你說是愛使人能面對一切的不可能。

因爲 ”我最後的信念，是若與你，再遇見⋯”

《平行世界》
作曲：G.E.M.鄧紫棋
作詞：G.E.M.鄧紫棋

失去你  我忘了天空曾經是  藍色
找不到你  我眼睛才在帽子下  躲著
不是愛上沉默  只是若你聽不見  何必呢
誰願到處漂泊  但你若不在  終點為何 

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你  再重寫

若與你  再遇見
能否與你  再重寫

從天而降的你  像一場流星雨  美麗
讓我措手不及  來不及許願就  失去你
玫瑰為什麼鮮紅  因為愛過的都痛
留守漆黑的夜空  我期盼著你的影蹤

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你  再重寫

若與你  再遇見
能否與你  再重寫

snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

《创造营2021》是由腾讯视频出品的国际青年文化交流男团成长综艺，致力于充分展现新时代国际青年人的音乐舞台表现力、青春活力和拼搏向上力。节目召集来自不同国家、不同经纪公司和院校的近百名学员，在多位榜样前辈的引领、助力、陪伴下一同进行文化与专业交流、打破重组迎接挑战，一同探索真我热血追梦。

snippet.title: CHUNG HA(청하) 'Bicycle' (바이시클) LIVE (‘Querencia’ Showcase)
snippet.description:
가수 청하의 첫 번째 정규앨범 ‘Querencia (케렌시아)’ 발매 온라인 쇼케이스가 15일 열렸다. 이날 청하는 타이틀곡 ‘Bicycle’ 무대를 최초로 공개했다. 또한 청하는 첫 정규앨범을 낸 소감과 컴백하는 소감 등을 전했다. 타이틀곡 ‘Bicycle’은 강렬한 퍼즈 기타의 도입부와 함께 전개되는 R&B 팝, 트랩 사운드의 곡으로 페달을 밟아 앞으로 나아가는 순간의 설렘과 벅찬 에너지를 표현한 가사가 인상적인 곡이다.

snippet.title: DOELPUNTRIJKE SLOTFASE! 😱 | Leicester City vs Liverpool | Premier League 2020/21 | Samenvatting
snippet.description:
Goals en highlights van Leicester City FC - Liverpool FC gespeeld in de Premier League op 13/02/2021. Bekijk alle doelpunten en hoogtepunten in de samenvatting van deze Engelse competitiewedstrijd. ⇨ Abonneer je nu op het YouTube kanaal van Ziggo Sport voor meer video's ⇨ http://bit.ly/2Q03IYg

Landskampioen Liverpool dat met maar liefst 18 punten voorsprong kampioen is geworden is the one to beat dit seizoen! Na dertig jaar wist Liverpool eindelijk weer de titel te pakken. Kunnen zij de titel ook dit jaar binnen halen? Of wordt het toch Manchester City, Manchester United of Chelsea met o.a. Hakim Ziyech? En hoe vergaat het Donny van der Beek bij zijn nieuwe club Manchester United?

De Premier League is dit seizoen spannender dan ooit! Volg het ook dit jaar weer allemaal live bij Ziggo Sport op kanaal 14!

snippet.title: Goodbye, Tanglin Halt: Bidding Farewell To Some Of Singapore's Oldest Flats | On The Red Dot
snippet.description:
One of Singapore’s oldest HDB estates, Tanglin Halt is fondly remembered for its iconic 10-storey flats that appeared on the nation’s first-ever $1 note, as well as the food stalls that still continue to dish out heritage hawker fare at the old wet market. But this year, everything is about to change. Tanglin Halt is undergoing the biggest redevelopment for public housing in Singapore – the Selective En bloc Redevelopment Scheme (SERS). History buff and food blogger Dr Leslie Tay takes a walk down memory lane, but as he soaks in the township’s old-world charm and meets the hawkers and residents of Tanglin Halt, he discovers a community whose bonds are deeply rooted in the coming of age of a nation.

===========
About On The Red Dot: CNA's weekly programme documents the stories of ordinary Singaporeans and celebrates their resilience, identity and sense of belonging.
===========
On The Red Dot playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLkMf14VQEvTYbQaR9ddxnJmJRangPrY5f

snippet.title: 80後夫妻雙雙送入醫院 一查竟是“糖尿病”！罪魁禍首竟然是一道蔬菜！
snippet.description:
#觀者Changer#糖尿病
一對80後夫妻雙雙被送進了醫院。經醫院檢查後顯示，兩人的血糖值都很高，已經是糖尿病前期了，妻子醒來得知這一消息，著急忙慌地表示二人平時菸酒不沾，也沒聽說過有遺傳史，怎麼會得糖尿病呢？在醫生的了解下，發現原來是一道素菜害了他們！今天，就跟著小觀一起來看看，究竟是什麼原因，導致了他們年紀輕輕就患上了糖尿病！

snippet.title: 中視 2021除夕特別節目：牛轉乾坤旺新春
snippet.description:
今年中視除夕特別節目《牛轉乾坤旺新春》一連播出5小時，邀請40多位藝人參與錄製，主持陣容堅強，由中視台內招牌節目《我愛冰冰Show》主持人白冰冰、陽帆、台一線，聯合《飢餓遊戲》的孫協志、王仁甫、許孟哲，黃金組合加上超強卡司，為今年的除夕特別節目增添新選擇。

中視《牛轉乾坤旺新春》表演陣容龐大，包括葉璦菱、龍千玉、蔡小虎、黃妃、曾心梅、秀蘭瑪雅、蘇宥蓉、甲子慧、陳孟賢、陳昭瑋、楊繡惠、白雲、曹西平、吳申梅、蔡佳麟、郭婷筠、陳怡婷、杜忻恬、蔡家蓁、曾瑋中、陳隨意、吳俊宏、朱海君、喬幼、唐儷、謝金晶、李子森、陳思瑋、曾治豪、方順吉。天王天后的豪華卡司要帶給觀眾象徵「十全十美」的十大經典華麗秀，還會加入詼諧逗趣的遊戲環節，百項好禮大放送，讓眾星卯足全力拚贏搶紅包

snippet.title: FIRST TO FINISH ART SCHOOL WINS || Drawing Challenge! Funny Painting Handmade by 123 GO! SCHOOL
snippet.description:

snippet.title: 全家温馨翻唱1946-2020年新年串烧！重新改编版你绝对没听过！【我说新年好｜大团圆｜天天好天｜大日子｜恭喜恭喜｜贺新年｜恭喜发财｜春风吻上了我的脸｜惜福】
snippet.description:
今年的农历新年因为疫情的关系，将会是一个有史以来最不热闹的新年。许多人不能回家过年，不能和家人一起吃久违的团圆饭。而我们一家人很幸运，可以在一起在家简单地过年。我希望我们能够透过这首新年串烧，把我们满满的幸福感带给大家，尤其是不能回家的你们，希望这首歌能够陪伴你过年❤️

你们知不知道，我们翻唱的这些歌曲都是我们所有人新年时喜欢到爆的新年歌😍，有耳熟能详的《大团圆》、百听不厌的《天天好天》、年轻一代新年歌代表《我说新年好》等等。这次的串烧翻唱 是为了致敬所有大马好听的新年歌 因为每一次听到这些新年歌时 都会自然的开始期待新年🙌 希望大马人可以继续传承这份传统，也期待未来每年都会不断地听到更多好听的新年歌😍

此MV全程都是在家里自己拍摄的，也没有请任何摄影师和工作人员帮忙，音乐制作也是通过网络隔空进行沟通的。疫情期间，希望大家能乖乖呆在家过新年🙌

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

［影片小制作 Video Small Small Production］

导演：BrysonLew刘铠翔
摄影：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 脚架 | 爸爸 | 大姐
摄导：BrysonLew刘铠翔
灯光：BrysonLew刘铠翔
剪辑：BrysonLew刘铠翔
调色：BrysonLew刘铠翔
场景布置：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐
美术/手工：大姐
新年道具：在家里的储藏室的深处找到的
服装：在各自的衣橱找的
拍摄场地：很够力实用的客厅
本集干爹：A Yogurt Cow一只酸奶牛

［音乐制作 Music Production］

出品人：BrysonLew刘铠翔
制作人：Justin吴宗翰
编曲人：Justin吴宗翰
钢琴：Justin吴宗翰
吉他编写：Justin吴宗翰 | Han Yun陈翰融
吉他：Han Yun陈翰融
鼓编写：David Nooi黃起潤
鼓：David Nooi黃起潤
中音萨克斯管：嘉文
配唱制作：BrysonLew刘铠翔
录音：BrysonLew刘铠翔
混音师：道鹏.daw
母带后置处理：道鹏.daw
翻唱：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 奶奶 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐

翻唱歌曲：
1946《恭喜恭喜》姚敏、姚莉
1948《贺新年》张帆
1956《春风吻上我的脸》姚莉
1957《恭喜发财》葛兰
2008《大团圆》My Astro
2010《天天好天》My Astro
2013《大日子》My Astro
2013《惜福》My astro
2020《我说新年好》常勇 | Danny | 舒森 | 培永 | Julene | 常樂

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Moo～ 红遍全球、拥有1000家分店的 # 一只酸奶牛 来到马来西亚啦！我们秉持着使用天然、健康和新鲜的材料调配出的特调酸奶饮料，并且依照季节推出新款饮料，绝对让你新鲜感不断！全店酸奶饮料使用100%水果调配，食材经严格把关并且适合三大种族饮用。

除了基本款的招牌紫米系列，我们也有牛油果抹茶小帽、芒来芒趣酸奶多、浓浓榴莲酸奶多、蜜瓜酸奶摇和奥利奥酸奶紫米露，各种水果搭配酸奶一起喝，喝多了也没有罪恶感！

————————————
|| 分行资讯 ||

📍A Yogurt Cow - JB Sutera 
26, Jalan Sutera Tanjung 8/3, Taman Sutera Utama, 81300 Skudai, Johor

📍A Yogurt Cow - Sri Petaling
12, Jalan Radin Bagus 1, Sri Petaling, 57000 Kuala Lumpur.

📍Coming Soon!!
- Penang
- Cheras
- Johor Jaya
- Sadakan

|| 加盟计划开跑中 ||
 +6017-572 6538

☞ 新年期间部分分行营业时间，可以联系专页查询
https://www.facebook.com/ayogurtcow.my
https://www.instagram.com/yogurtcow.my/

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
歌词

大团圆 大团圆 天天都是好天
这旅途 要珍惜彼此
La la la la... 

说一声恭喜贺新年 迎接美好的新一天
人人在门前贴春联yee进来 欢迎春降到人间爸进来 
兜一圈 又一年 春回到人间
看世间 每一天 
不停在转变
多少年 泛黄的那张贺 年片
一直留 在我记忆里面

抱一抱 笑一笑 
肩并肩欢呼 嘿! 新年好
要和和氣氣 哈哈嘻嘻
大家一起走下去

大团圆 大团圆 不管距离有多远 
这条路 只要有付出
走一步 每一步 不怕输

一天天 一年年
天天都是好天
好朋友 在身边 我们约定这一天

心若能放开一点 路就宽一些
财富和幸福之间 还有知足作界线
啦 啦 啦 啦

我說新年好 祝你今年好運到
你說新年好 祝我吉祥好預兆
快樂少不了 Happy 煩惱全忘掉
La La La La La La La La

大团圆 大团圆
不管距离有多远
好朋友 在身边 我们约定这一天

手牵着手一辈子     要惜福 珍惜你身边的人和物
他爱笑 你爱哭   有甜有苦才会有满足
 
PART 2
春风它吻上了我的脸
告诉我现在是春天
大团圆天天好天 
猪你有个大肥年
希望我钱包明年还 有钱

回首往事如烟　痛苦辛酸　寄望从今万事如愿

贺新年 祝新年 新年哪 年连年
爆竹声声催人想幼年
贺新年 祝新年 新年哪 年连年
岁月悠悠光阴如箭

咚 咚咚锵 咚 咚咚锵
咚 咚咚锵 咚锵咚锵

每条大街小巷   每个人的嘴里
见面第一句话   就是恭喜恭喜

恭喜恭喜恭喜你呀，恭喜恭喜恭喜你
恭喜恭喜恭喜你呀，恭喜恭喜恭喜你

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

📩    brysonlewcollab@gmail.com    📩

欢迎追踪小弟其他社交平台：

Instagram ：
@brysonlew 👉  https://www.instagram.com/brysonlew/?hl=en

zh-Hans.title: 全家温馨翻唱1946-2020年新年串烧！重新改编版你绝对没听过！【我说新年好｜大团圆｜天天好天｜大日子｜恭喜恭喜｜贺新年｜恭喜发财｜春风吻上了我的脸｜惜福】
zh-Hans.description:
今年的农历新年因为疫情的关系，将会是一个有史以来最不热闹的新年。许多人不能回家过年，不能和家人一起吃久违的团圆饭。而我们一家人很幸运，可以在一起在家简单地过年。我希望我们能够透过这首新年串烧，把我们满满的幸福感带给大家，尤其是不能回家的你们，希望这首歌能够陪伴你过年❤️

你们知不知道，我们翻唱的这些歌曲都是我们所有人新年时喜欢到爆的新年歌😍，有耳熟能详的《大团圆》、百听不厌的《天天好天》、年轻一代新年歌代表《我说新年好》等等。这次的串烧翻唱 是为了致敬所有大马好听的新年歌 因为每一次听到这些新年歌时 都会自然的开始期待新年🙌 希望大马人可以继续传承这份传统，也期待未来每年都会不断地听到更多好听的新年歌😍

此MV全程都是在家里自己拍摄的，也没有请任何摄影师和工作人员帮忙，音乐制作也是通过网络隔空进行沟通的。疫情期间，希望大家能乖乖呆在家过新年🙌

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

［影片小制作 Video Small Small Production］

导演：BrysonLew刘铠翔
摄影：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 脚架 | 爸爸 | 大姐
摄导：BrysonLew刘铠翔
灯光：BrysonLew刘铠翔
剪辑：BrysonLew刘铠翔
调色：BrysonLew刘铠翔
场景布置：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐
美术/手工：大姐
新年道具：在家里的储藏室的深处找到的
服装：在各自的衣橱找的
拍摄场地：很够力实用的客厅
本集干爹：A Yogurt Cow一只酸奶牛

［音乐制作 Music Production］

出品人：BrysonLew刘铠翔
制作人：Justin吴宗翰
编曲人：Justin吴宗翰
钢琴：Justin吴宗翰
吉他编写：Justin吴宗翰 | Han Yun陈翰融
吉他：Han Yun陈翰融
鼓编写：David Nooi黃起潤
鼓：David Nooi黃起潤
中音萨克斯管：嘉文
配唱制作：BrysonLew刘铠翔
录音：BrysonLew刘铠翔
混音师：道鹏.daw
母带后置处理：道鹏.daw
翻唱：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 奶奶 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐

翻唱歌曲：
1946《恭喜恭喜》姚敏、姚莉
1948《贺新年》张帆
1956《春风吻上我的脸》姚莉
1957《恭喜发财》葛兰
2008《大团圆》My Astro
2010《天天好天》My Astro
2013《大日子》My Astro
2013《惜福》My astro
2020《我说新年好》常勇 | Danny | 舒森 | 培永 | Julene | 常樂

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Moo～ 红遍全球、拥有1000家分店的 # 一只酸奶牛 来到马来西亚啦！我们秉持着使用天然、健康和新鲜的材料调配出的特调酸奶饮料，并且依照季节推出新款饮料，绝对让你新鲜感不断！全店酸奶饮料使用100%水果调配，食材经严格把关并且适合三大种族饮用。

除了基本款的招牌紫米系列，我们也有牛油果抹茶小帽、芒来芒趣酸奶多、浓浓榴莲酸奶多、蜜瓜酸奶摇和奥利奥酸奶紫米露，各种水果搭配酸奶一起喝，喝多了也没有罪恶感！

snippet.title: Eating Spicy Wings With Minister Dr Maliki Osman | Doing Things With Ministers
snippet.description:
In our next episode of Doing Things With Ministers, we had a chat with Minister Dr Maliki Osman to find out more about the man — from his childhood days, to his very first election, to one of the main things he wants to fight for as a politician.

But of course, John had to ‘spice’ things up a bit and challenged him to take on a plate of fiery chicken wings. Can he handle the heat?

snippet.title: G League Ignite vs. Santa Cruz Warriors - Condensed Game
snippet.description:
The NBA G League is the NBA's official minor league. Fans can get a glimpse at the players, coaches and officials competing to ascend to the NBA's rank. With 40 percent of players on start-of-season NBA rosters boasting NBA G League experience when the 2018-19 season tipped off in October, the NBA G League YouTube Channel is the best place to see the future now.

The NBA G League consists of 27 teams for the 2018-19 season, all singly affiliated with an NBA franchise: Agua Caliente Clippers of Ontario (Los Angeles Clippers), Austin Spurs (San Antonio Spurs), Canton Charge (Cleveland Cavaliers), Capital City Go-Go (Washington Wizards), Delaware Blue Coats (Philadelphia 76ers), Erie BayHawks (Atlanta Hawks), Fort Wayne Mad Ants (Indiana Pacers), Grand Rapids Drive (Detroit Pistons), Greensboro Swarm (Charlotte Hornets), Iowa Wolves (Minnesota Timberwolves), Lakeland Magic (Orlando Magic), Long Island Nets (Brooklyn Nets), Maine Red Claws (Boston Celtics), Memphis Hustle (Memphis Grizzlies) Northern Arizona Suns (Phoenix Suns), Oklahoma City Blue (Oklahoma City Thunder), Raptors 905 (Toronto Raptors), Rio Grande Valley Vipers (Houston Rockets), Salt Lake City Stars (Utah Jazz), Santa Cruz Warriors (Golden State Warriors), Sioux Falls Skyforce (Miami Heat), South Bay Lakers (Los Angeles Lakers), Stockton Kings (Sacramento Kings), Texas Legends (Dallas Mavericks), Westchester Knicks (New York Knicks) and Wisconsin Herd (Milwaukee Bucks).

Visit us on the web: http://www.NBAGLeague.com
Like us on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/nbagleague

snippet.title: 🤯 LATE COMEBACK DRAMA! | HIGHLIGHTS | Granada 3-5 Barça
snippet.description:
With just two minutes to play, Barça looked to be heading out of the cup when the blaugrana pressure finally paid off, the away side scoring two late goals to take the game into extra time. In the additional 30 minutes, Ronald Koeman's side secured their place in the semi-finals with goals from Griezmann, De Jong and Jordi Alba to seal victory! Check out the highlights!

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: Indonesia’s ‘silver people’ strive to make a living
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

In Indonesia’s West Java province, Puryanti has been struggling to make a living. Finding it difficult to get work, the single mother, along with her son and nephew, have been wearing silver paint and bowing to people on the busy streets of Jakarta for an occasional coin. On a good day, Puryanti earns just 50,000-70,000 rupiah (US$3.58-US$5.00).

snippet.title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake hits Japan off Fukushima coast | DW News
snippet.description:
A magnitude 7.3 earthquake struck northeastern Japan, off the coast of Fukushima, on Saturday night. More than 130 people have been reported injured and some 860,000 homes are without power. The Meteorological Agency believes this was an aftershock from the massive earthquake that hit the region in 2011.
The initial quake was followed by a series of aftershocks.
Back in 2011, a similar earthquake in the same region triggered a tsunami. That caused a severe nuclear accident. The Fukushima nuclear power plant had a meltdown that leaked radiation into the atmosphere and the Pacific Ocean. The clean-up from that disaster will likely take another 30 to 40 years. 
Japanese Prime Minister Yoshihide Suga has dismissed worries that  Fukushima's nuclear plant could suffer a new leak from this latest quake.
As residents began cleaning up the aftermath, officials are calling on people to remain on the alert for further aftershocks in the coming weeks.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar 

Social Media Links 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms/​

snippet.title: Jeremy Lin Highlights - G League Warriors vs Raptors 2/15/2021
snippet.description: Jeremy Lin Scores 17 points to go with 8 assists but comes up short against Raptors.  Lin would have scored much more had he been able to hit a few extra 3 pointers, only shooting 1 of 6 from downtown.  But did have a solid T/O assist ratio with only 2 turnovers and added 2 rebounds.

Lyrics:
I’m on an island
Even when you’re close
Can’t take the silence
I’d rather be alone
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won’t be a burden if we both don’t hold a grudge
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

Now you’re holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don’t give me that look just say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: 《鳳凰午間特快》習近平主席與美國總統拜登通電話；拜登訪國防部，強調外交不輕易動武；世衛專家料下周到訪科興設施評估疫苗 20210210【下載鳳凰秀App，發現更多精彩】
snippet.description:
2月11日，中國農曆除夕上午，中國國家主席習近平與美國總統拜登通電話。兩國元首就中國牛年春節相互拜年，並就雙邊關係和重大國際及地區問題深入交換意見。

美國總統拜登與副總統哈里斯10日前往五角大樓訪問，期間參觀黑人士兵展覽，並且在講話當中談及新政府的國防政策，強調外交的重要性。

世衛專家下周將會到中國科興生物到美國的設施，評估科興疫苗。

*嘉賓言論不代表鳳凰秀立場

https://twitter.com/Fengshows

* 歡迎訂閱【鳳凰秀軍情觀察室】專欄頻道：https://reurl.cc/WLXvYD
鳳凰衛視王牌評論節目，緊盯全球軍事熱點，網羅軍事專家齊聚一堂，為觀眾打造28分鐘的軍事盛宴。

* 歡迎訂閱【鳳凰秀財經專區】http://a0.pise.pw/vndb8
為您提供最有價值和前瞻性財經資訊，以獨特的視角緊隨市場焦點，鮮明的觀點透視解讀市場趨勢，節目中更有最權威、最高端人士對事件作出一針見血的點評，為您提供財經領域的走勢和趨勢，率先把握時局帶來的機遇。《財經正前方》《財智菁英匯》《金石財經》《中國深度財經》《鳳凰財經日報》等精彩節目將在此頻道更新，歡迎關注收看。

美國總統拜登與副總統哈里斯10日前往五角大樓訪問，期間參觀黑人士兵展覽，並且在講話當中談及新政府的國防政策，強調外交的重要性。

世衛專家下周將會到中國科興生物到美國的設施，評估科興疫苗。

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: My Star Bride 过江新娘 EP8
snippet.description:
Xiang Lan finds Fang Cao and hands her a bag of valuables to safekeep. She lies that her husband is in debt, abuses her and forces her to work. Fang Cao feels indignant and suggests to make a police report but Xiang Lan stops her and leaves in a hurry. Shi Jie asks about their relationship, to which Fang Cao shares about their helplessness as Vietnamese brides so he understands her better now.  

香兰来找芳草，将一包贵重物品交给她保管，谎称丈夫赌钱欠债，家暴她还逼她去工作。芳草不忿，建议报警，香兰阻止，匆匆离开。世杰问起芳草和香兰的关系，芳草说起与同乡一起过江来当新娘的无奈，让世杰对她有了多一点了解。

#MyStarBride #过江新娘
-- --

snippet.title: 陳豪陳茵媺一家五口拍片拜年　細女 Camilla 突爆音尖叫被哥哥斜睥險開年 │ 01娛樂
snippet.description:
陳豪與老婆陳茵媺趁大年初二聯同三個寶貝仔女，7 歲的大仔陳梓燁 (Aiden)、5 歲的次子陳浩鋒 (Nathan) 以及 4 歲的細女 Camilla，一家五口齊齊穿上紅卜卜的賀年新裝同大家拜年，他們把拜年的靚相和短片 post 上 IG。

詳盡全文即撳 → http://bit.ly/2Zn2s94 

在賀年短片臨結尾時，Camilla 竟突然爆音尖叫，即時搶晒 Fo，未知是否太興奮所致。不過她就遭到爹哋以及媽咪皺眉示意收聲。而二哥 Nathan 更帶點怒氣斜「啤」住她，大哥 Aiden 隨後亦有「啤」埋一份，Camilla 卻一臉無辜，場面搞笑。有網民就笑言 Camilla 差點被開年。

snippet.title: Douluo Continent (Dunia Douluo) | 斗罗大陆 | EP01 | Xiao Zhan, Wu Xuan Yi | WeTV【INDO SUB】
snippet.description:
Yuk tonton full episodenya, GRATIS melalui apps WeTV disini http://bit.ly/3oM1ptz !

Ditinggal ibunya saat masih kecil, Tang San tumbuh dengan bergantung pada ayahnya. Begitu juga sang ayah bergantung padanya. Cermat dan dewasa untuk bocah seusianya plus bakat dan luar biasa yang ia miliki, ia dikirim ke Rouding Academy di umur 6 tahun demi mengejar cita-cita menjadi seorang roh petarung. Di sana, di bawah pengawasan Yu Xiao Gang, ia berkawan dengan seorang bocah yatim bernama Gu Xiao Wu. Bersama mereka menjalani jatuh bangun demi menjadi murid terbaik. Seiring waktu mereka kian dekat, bersumpah untuk saling menjaga satu sama lain dan jadi saudara angkat seumur hidup. Saat kekuatan dan kepandaian mereka kian bertambah, Gu Xiao Wu sadar kalau ia membutuhkan lebih banyak bimbingan dari guru lain. Maka, ia dan Tang San dikirim ke Shrek Academy. Di sana, mereka bergabung bersama lima murid berbakat lain dari berbagai perguruan. Berbekal kekuatan masing-masing ketujuh murid lalu dikenal di seantero daratan sebagai "Tujuh Iblis Shrek". Kala mereka kian tersohor, tujuh murid itu menarik perhatian para tetua dan mengundang mereka melanjutkan pendidikan di Akademi Kerajaan Tian Dou. Namun, tak lama usai menerima undangan mereka mendapati diri terperangkap dalam intrik istana antara pangeran pertama dan pangeran ke-empat. Di waktu yang sama, Tang San menyingkap rahasia yang lama tersembunyi menyangkut kematian ibunya. Saat menghadapi berbagai konflik di setiap segi, Tang San terpaksa bertarung. Tidak hanya untuk melindungi orang yang ia sayangi, namun juga demi membela harkat kelompoknya, menyelamatkan bangsanya, serta menggenapi upayanya untuk menjadi roh petarung terhebat sepanjang masa.

Di sana, di bawah pengawasan Yu Xiao Gang, ia berkawan dengan seorang bocah yatim bernama Gu Xiao Wu. Bersama mereka menjalani jatuh bangun demi menjadi murid terbaik. Seiring waktu mereka kian dekat, bersumpah untuk saling menjaga satu sama lain dan jadi saudara angkat seumur hidup. Saat kekuatan dan kepandaian mereka kian bertambah, Gu Xiao Wu sadar kalau ia membutuhkan lebih banyak bimbingan dari guru lain. Maka, ia dan Tang San dikirim ke Shrek Academy. Di sana, mereka bergabung bersama lima murid berbakat lain dari berbagai perguruan. Berbekal kekuatan masing-masing ketujuh murid lalu dikenal di seantero daratan sebagai "Tujuh Iblis Shrek". Kala mereka kian tersohor, tujuh murid itu menarik perhatian para tetua dan mengundang mereka melanjutkan pendidikan di Akademi Kerajaan Tian Dou. Namun, tak lama usai menerima undangan mereka mendapati diri terperangkap dalam intrik istana antara pangeran pertama dan pangeran ke-empat. Di waktu yang sama, Tang San menyingkap rahasia yang lama tersembunyi menyangkut kematian ibunya. Saat menghadapi berbagai konflik di setiap segi, Tang San terpaksa bertarung. Tidak hanya untuk melindungi orang yang ia sayangi, namun juga demi membela harkat kelompoknya, menyelamatkan bangsanya, serta menggenapi upayanya untuk menjadi roh petarung terhebat sepanjang masa.
Douluo Continent (Dunia Douluo) | 斗罗大陆 | EP01 | Xiao Zhan, Wu Xuan Yi | WeTV【INDO SUB】

snippet.title: প্যানিক বাটন টিপলেই কমে যাবে গতি,  আছে সিসিটিভি, দেবে নিরাপত্তাও | Baagh EcoTaxi | Somoy TV
snippet.description:
#Baagh #EcoTaxi
নাম তার 'বাঘ'। একাধারে পরিবেশ বান্ধব, সাশ্রয়ী এবং নিরাপদও বটে। তবে এটি বনের বাঘের গল্প নয়, এটি একটি থ্রি হুইলারের গল্প। এতে আছে ওয়াইফাই সুবিধা, টিভি দেখার ব্যবস্থাও। প্রচলিত এসিড ব্যাটারির বিপরীতে এটি তৈরি হয়েছে পরিবেশবান্ধব সোলার ও লিথিয়াম ব্যাটারির সমন্বয়ে। যথাযথ পৃষ্ঠপোষকতা পেলে দেশীয় চাহিদা মেটানোর পাশাপাশি অদূর ভবিষ্যতে 'বাঘ' আয় করতে পারবে বৈদেশিক মুদ্রাও। সম্পূর্ণ দেশীয় এই উদ্যোগের মূল কাণ্ডারি কাজী জসিমুল ইসলাম বাপ্পীর সঙ্গে কথা বলেছেন আতিকুর রহমান তমাল। 

আরও বিস্তারিত জানতে ভিজিট করুন: https://www.somoynews.tv

localized.description:
#Baagh #EcoTaxi
নাম তার 'বাঘ'। একাধারে পরিবেশ বান্ধব, সাশ্রয়ী এবং নিরাপদও বটে। তবে এটি বনের বাঘের গল্প নয়, এটি একটি থ্রি হুইলারের গল্প। এতে আছে ওয়াইফাই সুবিধা, টিভি দেখার ব্যবস্থাও। প্রচলিত এসিড ব্যাটারির বিপরীতে এটি তৈরি হয়েছে পরিবেশবান্ধব সোলার ও লিথিয়াম ব্যাটারির সমন্বয়ে। যথাযথ পৃষ্ঠপোষকতা পেলে দেশীয় চাহিদা মেটানোর পাশাপাশি অদূর ভবিষ্যতে 'বাঘ' আয় করতে পারবে বৈদেশিক মুদ্রাও। সম্পূর্ণ দেশীয় এই উদ্যোগের মূল কাণ্ডারি কাজী জসিমুল ইসলাম বাপ্পীর সঙ্গে কথা বলেছেন আতিকুর রহমান তমাল। 

আরও বিস্তারিত জানতে ভিজিট করুন: https://www.somoynews.tv

snippet.title: RFA နေ့စဉ်တိုက်ရိုက်ထုတ်လွှင့်ချက် (၂ဝ၂၁ ဖေဖော်ဝါရီ  ၁၅ ရက် နံနက်ပိုင်း)
snippet.description:
-  အသံချဲ့စက်မသုံးဖို့ဆန္ဒပြသူချင်းသတိပေး
- CDM ထောက်ခံတဲ့ ဒယ်အိုးဆရာတော်နဲ့ မေးမြန်းခန်း
- ကချင်တိုင်းရင်းသားဘာသာအစီအစဉ်
... စတာတွေကို ရှုစားနားဆင်ရမှာပါ။


---------------------------------
လွတ်လပ်တဲ့အာရှအသံ
မြန်မာသတင်းနဲ့ဗီဒီယိုတွေ ကြည့်နိုင်ဖို့

snippet.title: 被中国外交部点赞，日本纪录片导演竹内亮用镜头展现真实的中国 | CCTV「面对面」
snippet.description:
日本的纪录片导演竹内亮疫情期间在南京和武汉拍摄的纪录片在中日两国都火了，而且还得到了中国外交部发言人的点名赞赏，《面对面》专访日本纪录片导演竹内亮。

《面对面》是一档长篇人物专访节目，秉持新闻性、权威性、关注度、影响力的诉求，面对面的交流，心与心的碰撞，用对话记录历史，以人物解读新闻。

snippet.title: Pimping Our Evergreen Girlfriend Despite Her Fears Of Rejection | ZULA Makeovers | EP2
snippet.description:
Shirley loves t-shirts (especially school ones) and FBTs, and she was nominated by 3 friends who feel that she can dress to match her bubbly personality more. With a refreshed look, they think it's also time for her to venture into the dating world, and Shirley actually gets sent on a blind date!

Special thanks to Singapore Tourism Board for making this video possible.

snippet.title: Nasib malang si pencuri
snippet.description:
Bukan saja gagal memecah masuk sebuah rumah di Taman Khidmat, di sini, semalam, malah terpaksa memanjat bumbung selepas dikejar dua anjing peliharaan pemilik kediaman berkenaan.

Itu nasib malang seorang penjenayah berusia 38 tahun yang akhirnya ditahan polis.

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜競馬Fact Check Live直播九場HKJC香港賽馬會快活谷草地夜馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬—蘋果日報 Apple Daily 原刊日期：20210210
snippet.description:
周三（10日）跑馬地馬場上演九場賽事，頭場定於傍晚6時45分開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

《競馬Fact Check》今季新增AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，仲會新增出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》新增參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於傍晚6時10分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》會全程直播。

蘋果日報 ： http://hk.apple.nextmedia.com
即 like 蘋果 fb  ： http://www.facebook.com/hk.nextmedia
iPhone App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-iPhone
Android App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-Android
=======

snippet.title: 多情城市 EP360  復仇是甜美的｜Golden City
snippet.description:
本集劇情重點：

威廉責備大慶為何要去投案，害他變成殺人犯之子，大慶勸威廉別再做壞事，威廉說漏了自己已有小孩，大慶訝異，威廉表示要做個和大慶不一樣的爸爸。

慧君和思思到工地探班，沒想到世昌竟是工頭，慧君請世昌要好好幫她監工。雨宣到工地探視軍情，不慎跌倒將自己弄得滿身泥濘，工人帶她到辦公室清理，慧君等人傻眼，覺得她活該。

雨宣將氣發洩在加堯，也罵世昌竟幫慧君蓋賣場，見加堯腰酸背痛樣，誤以為他和文真熱情如火，更加生氣，文真故意傳性感睡衣網址介紹給雨宣，雨宣暴怒體罰加堯做棒式，加堯有苦難言。

慧君和思思討論賣場的熟食區該如何經營，思思推薦可承包給玉蓮，慧君認同。

淑娟要正群一家三口搬離羅家，正群難過，小飛幫忙解釋正群是愛淑娟的，但曉安在一旁搧風點火，淑娟堅決脫離關係，正群只好謝謝淑娟多年的養育之恩，帶小飛和冠廷離開。

小飛三人回到玉蓮家，玉蓮雖不捨小飛遭遇，但開心可以和小飛及冠廷同住。

加堯和雨宣到工地找世昌，希望世昌別幫慧君蓋賣場，世昌表示自己只是員工，無權決定，轉身離開，雨宣安撫加堯，有親密的動作，世昌折返拿安全帽，見到兩人行為，斥責兩人，雨宣替加堯發聲怪世昌不愛兒子，被加堯斥責要她出去，雨宣不開心離，世昌勸加堯別再亂搞男女關係，加堯否認到底，兩人不歡而散。

曉安要威廉去追正怡，因為淑娟已將股份全過戶給正怡，若能成功，等於鴻騰股份就掌控在曉安和威廉手裡。

羅俊找淑娟溝通，希望她別將對羅俊的怨恨發洩在正群，淑娟想起正群對她的關愛，有點軟化，但嘴硬不肯鬆口，羅俊要她再好好想想。

世昌送工地日誌給慧君，兩人不小心有什麼看似親密的動作被來訪的玉蓮見到，慧君趕緊要解釋卻越描越黑，玉蓮原本是要送熟食區企劃案，誤會世昌和慧君在交往，便臨時決定不接案，離去。世昌追上玉蓮，關心近況，玉蓮冷回應，世昌解釋真的跟慧君沒什麼，玉蓮覺得自己沒資格管，但可憐正群和小飛因為投資慧君被趕出家門，世昌訝異。

威廉找正怡心理諮商，正怡原本拒絕，曉安來，故意說反話激怒正怡，正怡一氣故意答應幫威廉諮商，卻不知已陷入小安和威廉的陰謀。

文真監視雨宣，看到雨宣的手機開機密碼，通知思思可進行下一步。

張廷提起慧君賣場熟食區無人承包，阿滿覺得自己可以承包。

文真約思思到楊氏物流談賣場物流合作，加堯傻眼，文真支開加堯，拿出甜點和思思及雨宣分享，故意將有問題的一塊遞給雨宣，思思裝肚痛去洗手間，接著換文真也去，雨宣真的肚痛，到了洗手間，三間有兩間被使用，她只能進去第三間，沒想到思思和文真從另兩間出來，文真手裡拿著第三間的一綑衛生紙在手裡，得意的偷笑。
